titles.title: Providing for disposition of the Senate amendment to the bill (H.R. 7147) making further consolidated appropriations for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2026, and for other purposes.
Providing for disposition of the Senate amendment to the bill (H.R. 7147) making further consolidated appropriations for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2026, and for other purposes.
Providing for disposition of the Senate amendment to the bill (H.R. 7147) making further consolidated appropriations for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2026, and for other purposes.

action.text: The House Committee on Rules reported an original measure, H. Rept. 119-575, by Mrs. Fischbach.

The resolution provides that the House shall be considered to have taken from the Speaker's table H.R. 7147 and to have concurred in the Senate amendment with an amendment consisting of the text of Rules Committee Print 119-21.

calendar.text: Placed on the House Calendar, Calendar No. 69.

action.text: DEBATE - The House proceeded with one hour of debate on H. Res. 1142.
On ordering the previous question Agreed to by the Yeas and Nays: 209 - 206 (Roll no. 107).

vote.text: On agreeing to the resolution Agreed to by recorded vote: 213 - 203 (Roll no. 108).

action.text: Motion to reconsider laid on the table Agreed to without objection.
